name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.14.0 - SURVIVAL LAYER. UserPromptSubmit hook now reads ~/.codialectic/state.json on every turn + statusline.sh renders codi state in Claude Code status bar. Codi no longer dies on compaction — persistent state file + hook config survive context drops. Other users can install + see codi alive in their IDE status bar without depending on AI to remember it is active.
_product_vs_solution_marker: product-vs-solution: example — Anand authorship attribution is legitimate
